Class ReactiveStreamCommands.DeleteExCommand

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveStreamCommands.DeleteExCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
ReactiveRedisConnection.Command
Enclosing interface:
ReactiveStreamCommands
public static class ReactiveStreamCommands.DeleteExCommand extends ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand
XDELEX command parameters.
Since:
4.1
Author:
Viktoriya Kutsarova

  • Method Details

    • stream

      public static ReactiveStreamCommands.DeleteExCommand stream(ByteBuffer key)
      Creates a new ReactiveStreamCommands.DeleteExCommand given a key.
      Parameters:
      key - must not be null.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveStreamCommands.DeleteExCommand for key.

    • records

      public ReactiveStreamCommands.DeleteExCommand records(String... recordIds)
      Applies the recordIds. Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties.
      Parameters:
      recordIds - must not be null.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveStreamCommands.DeleteExCommand with recordIds applied.

    • records

      public ReactiveStreamCommands.DeleteExCommand records(RecordId... recordIds)
      Applies the recordIds. Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties.
      Parameters:
      recordIds - must not be null.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveStreamCommands.DeleteExCommand with recordIds applied.

    • withOptions

      public ReactiveStreamCommands.DeleteExCommand withOptions(RedisStreamCommands.XDelOptions options)
      Applies the RedisStreamCommands.XDelOptions. Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties.
      Parameters:
      options - must not be null.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveStreamCommands.DeleteExCommand with RedisStreamCommands.XDelOptions applied.
